com.jsyn.unitgen

Class Grain

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.Grain
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GrainEnvelope

    public class Grain
extends java.lang.Object
implements GrainEnvelope
    A single Grain that is normally created and controlled by a GrainFarm.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2011 Mobileer Inc
